reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar, lastima que no están habilitados todos los servicios.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, it's a shame that not all the services are available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MjUzUXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Desastre!!! Al playero hubo que ir a buscarlo adentro... sentado en una silla tranki.  Baños clausurados. Shop caro y precios diferentes en el mismo producto a distintas personas. No tienen lugar para tirar los papeles...

(Translated by Google)
Disaster!!! We had to go inside to find the beach attendant... sitting in a nice chair. Bathrooms were closed. The shop was expensive and different prices for the same product for different people. They don't have a place to throw away trash...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bTlhQkZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Lo único lindo es la vista. Los chistesitos del playero estaban demas.

(Translated by Google)
The only nice thing about it is the view. The beach attendant's jokes were unnecessary.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ODZqeGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cierra muy temprano, pasamos a las 22, un sábado, en pleno enero, siendo temporada alta.

(Translated by Google)
It closes very early, we went in at 10 pm, on a Saturday, in the middle of January, during peak season.

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio mejor ubicada frente a este paraíso

(Translated by Google)
The best located gas station in front of this paradise

reviews.comment:
La única en kilómetros, poco personal pero muy amable, hay q esperar bastante pero no molesta mucho porque mientras podemos apreciar el lago, los precios bastante altos en el servi compras.

(Translated by Google)
The only one for miles, with few but very friendly staff. You have to wait a long time, but it's not too bothersome because while you can appreciate the lake, the prices at the shopping center are quite high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5N0pIWV9RRRAB
